2014-T3-P5-S3.trunk: 并列松散句：① it is a good thing that … ② It is fair to … — but ③ it is the prize-givers' money to do with as they please
structure: 分句①（形式主语 it）：it is surely a good thing that the money and attention come to science rather than go elsewhere
└ 主语从句(that)：that the money and attention come to science rather than go elsewhere
分句②（形式主语 it）：It is fair to criticize and question the mechanism
└ 破折号插入：that is the culture of research, after all
but 分句③：it is the prize-givers' money to do with as they please
├ 不定式作定语〔修饰 money〕：to do with
└ 方式状语从句(as)：as they please
2014-T3-P5-S3.logic: 三个分句：①②均为 it 形式主语（真正主语分别是 that 从句、to criticize… 不定式）；③ it is the … money to do with as they please（这是奖金颁发者的钱，他们爱怎么花就怎么花）；破折号插入解释 mechanism。
notes: ①it is a good thing that…：it 形式主语，真正主语是 that 从句。②It is fair to criticize…：it 形式主语，真正主语是不定式。
破折号夹的 that is the culture of research, after all 是插入解释（毕竟这就是科研文化）。
to do with as they please：to do with 不定式作定语修饰 money，as they please 方式状语（随他们高兴怎么处置）。

2014-T3-P4-S3.trunk: S+V(被动)：the Nobel Foundation's limit … has long been outgrown by the collaborative nature of modern research（诺奖「每奖至多三人」的限制 早已被现代科研的协作性所超越）
structure: 主句：the Nobel Foundation's limit of three recipients per prize … has long been outgrown by the collaborative nature of modern research
├ 非限制性定语从句〔each of whom，修饰 recipients〕：each of whom must still be living
└ 破折号 + 非限制性定语从句(as)：as will be demonstrated by the inevitable row over who is ignored …
└ 宾语从句(who，作 over 的宾语)：who is ignored when it comes to acknowledging the discovery of the Higgs boson
└ 时间状语从句(when)：when it comes to acknowledging the discovery of the Higgs boson
2014-T3-P4-S3.logic: 主句被动 limit has been outgrown by…；each of whom… 非限制定语从句修饰 recipients（造成主谓分隔）；破折号后 as 引导非限制性定语从句（正如…所示）；row over who…（who 宾语从句）；when it comes to doing 当谈到…时。
notes: 主谓分隔：主语 limit 与谓语 has long been outgrown 被 each of whom must still be living 隔开。
has been outgrown by…：被动（已被…超越/不再适应）。
as will be demonstrated…：as 引导非限制性定语从句（正如…将证明）；when it comes to + doing 当谈及…时。

2014-T3-P1-S5.trunk: 并列双分句(and)：① These benefactors have succeeded … ② they want to use their wealth to draw attention to …（这些捐助者已在各自领域成功，他们想用财富让人关注…）
structure: 分句①：These benefactors have succeeded in their chosen fields
并列(and)分句②：they want to use their wealth to draw attention to those …
├ 不定式作目的：to draw attention to those
└ 定语从句〔who，修饰 those〕：who have succeeded in science
2014-T3-P1-S5.logic: they say 插入语；and 连接两分句；分句② want to do + to draw attention（目的）；who 定语从句修饰 those。
notes: they say 是插入语（他们说），可提出。
use their wealth to draw attention to…：to draw… 不定式作目的状语。
those who have succeeded in science：who 定语从句修饰 those。
